meta.question: Find signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" that are still referenced by active diagrams.
meta.finalAnswer:
No signals under "_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals" are referenced by active diagrams.

Found 13 signals in the recycle bin package:
1. Receive reply from TCS (APS-TCS)
2. M3_Status_Position_Query (APS-TCS)
3. M3_Status_Position_Ack (APS-TCS)
4. Ask TCS to point telescope to the star (APS-TCS)
5. signal_GetK-MirrPos_A (APS-Internal)
6. signal_GetTiltPlate_A (APS-Internal)
7. signal_SelectFilter_Ack (APS-Internal)
8. signal_SelectFilter_Query (APS-Internal)
9. signal_SelectPupilMask_Query (APS-Internal)
10. signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack (APS-Internal)
11. signal_take_expoure_A (APS-Internal)
12. signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack (APS-CommonService)
13. signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query (APS-CommonService)

None of these signals have any incoming references from:
- Messages (Message_signature)
- Send Signal Actions (SendSignalAction_signal)
- Triggers (Trigger_event → SignalEvent_signal)
- Diagram contexts or elements

All 13 signals appear to be orphaned elements with no active diagram references.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("RecycleBin"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "_TMT_RecycleBin" . 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/_TMT_RecycleBin> vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("01 signals")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/_TMT_RecycleBin> vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .

  ?elem rdf:type ?type .

request.reason: Found 13 signals under the '_TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals' package. Now I need to check which of these signals are referenced by active diagrams. I need to explore how diagrams reference signals in this model.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

SELECT ?diagram ?diagName ?elem ?elemName WHERE {
  ?diagram rdf:type vocab:diagram .
  ?diagram vocab:NamedElement_name ?diagName .
  ?diagram vocab:Diagram_context ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elemName), "signal"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found messages with signatures pointing to signals, but none of them reference signals from the _TMT_RecycleBin::01 signals package. I need to check if signals from the recycle bin are referenced in any other way - perhaps through SendSignalAction or other mechanisms. Let me explore how signals might be referenced in diagrams.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?actionName ?sig ?sigName WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?sig .
  ?action vocab:NamedElement_name ?actionName .
  ?sig vocab:NamedElement_name ?sigName .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?sig), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?actionName ?sig WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?sig .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?action ?actionName ?sig ?sigName ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?action rdf:type vocab:send%20signal%20action .
  ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?sig .
  ?action vocab:NamedElement_name ?actionName .
  ?sig vocab:NamedElement_name ?sigName .
  ?action vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?sig), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?trigger ?triggerName ?event ?evName ?sig ?sigName WHERE {
  ?trigger rdf:type vocab:trigger .
  ?trigger vocab:Trigger_event ?event .
  ?event rdf:type vocab:signal%20event .
  ?event vocab:SignalEvent_signal ?sig .
  ?sig rdf:type vocab:signal .
  ?sig vocab:NamedElement_name ?sigName .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?sig), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?elem), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sig ?sigName ?refType ?refName WHERE {
  VALUES ?sig {
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::Receive%2520reply%2520from%2520TCS>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::Ask%2520TCS%2520to%2520point%2520telescope%2520to%2520the%2520star>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetTiltPlate_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query>
  }
  ?sig vocab:NamedElement_name ?sigName .
  
  # Check for Message_signature references
  OPTIONAL {
    ?msg vocab:Message_signature ?sig .
    ?msg vocab:NamedElement_name ?refName .
    BIND("message" AS ?refType)
  }
  
  # Check for SendSignalAction references
  OPTIONAL {
    ?action vocab:SendSignalAction_signal ?sig .
    ?action vocab:NamedElement_name ?refName .
    BIND("sendSignalAction" AS ?refType)
  }
  
  FILTER(BOUND(?refName))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sig ?sigName ?ref ?refName ?refType WHERE {
  VALUES ?sig {
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::Receive%2520reply%2520from%2520TCS>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::Ask%2520TCS%2520to%2520point%2520telescope%2520to%2520the%2520star>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetTiltPlate_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-CommonService::signal_Get_segment_intalled_Query>
  }
  ?sig vocab:NamedElement_name ?sigName .
  
  # Check for any incoming references
  ?ref ?prop ?sig .
  ?ref vocab:NamedElement_name ?refName .
  FILTER(?ref != ?sig)
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sig ?sigName ?prop ?ref ?refName WHERE {
  VALUES ?sig {
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::Receive%2520reply%2520from%2520TCS>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::M3_Status_Position_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-TCS::Ask%2520TCS%2520to%2520point%2520telescope%2520to%2520the%2520star>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetTiltPlate_A>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectFilter_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Query>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_SelectPupilMask_Ack>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_take_expoure_A>

  }
  ?sig vocab:NamedElement_name ?sigName .
  
  # Check for any incoming references (inverse direction)
  ?ref ?prop ?sig .
  ?ref vocab:NamedElement_name ?refName .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/signal/_TMT_RecycleBin::01%2520signals::APS-Internal::signal_GetK-MirrPos_A> ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?viewName ?type WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520DDD::Hardware%2520Decomposition%2520and%2520Interfaces> ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?view ?viewName ?ctx ?ctxName WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName .
  ?view vocab:Diagram_context ?ctx .
  ?ctx vocab:NamedElement_name ?ctxName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?ctxName), "signal"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?view ?viewName ?ctx ?ctxName WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:NamedElement_name ?viewName .
  ?view vocab:Diagram_context ?ctx .
  ?ctx vocab:NamedElement_name ?ctxName .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520DDD::Hardware%2520Decomposition%2520and%2520Interfaces> ?prop ?value .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?prop), "Diagram"))
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?diag ?diagName ?ctx ?ctxName WHERE {
  ?view rdf:type vocab:view .
  ?view vocab:Namespace_ownedDiagram ?diag .
  ?diag vocab:NamedElement_name ?diagName .
  ?diag vocab:Diagram_context ?ctx .
  ?ctx vocab:NamedElement_name ?ctxName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?diag ?diagName ?type WHERE {
  ?diag rdf:type ?type .
  ?diag vocab:NamedElement_name ?diagName .
  FILTER(?type = vocab:view || ?type = vocab:activity)
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520DDD::Hardware%2520Decomposition%2520and%2520Interfaces> ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 50

None of these signals have any incoming references from:

- Diagram contexts or elements

All 13 signals appear to be orphaned elements with no active diagram references.
